CustomField.description: Default value for the PaymentMethod field on newly created employer GiftEntry records. Applied only when PaymentMethod is not included in FieldsToCopy__c or when its copied value is blank. Must match a valid PaymentMethod picklist value (e.g. Check, Credit Card, EFT, Cash, In Kind, Other). Leave blank to rely entirely on FieldsToCopy__c.
CustomField.label: Default Payment Method
